subject: A white-winged pegasus pierced mid-flight by a glowing arrow, falling from the sky
description: A majestic white pegasus is caught mid-air at the moment of being struck by a luminous arrow that has passed through its body. Its great feathered wings are spread wide, slightly buckling, and its body twists in pained motion as it begins to fall. Loose white feathers scatter around it. The background is a pale, washed-out sky in blue-grey and white tones, giving the scene a stark, tragic quality. Flavor text references Oketra's shot piercing the pegasus and Gideon tumbling through the air, framing this as a wartime tragedy moment in Ravnica's defense.
foreground: white pegasus with spread wings, struck by glowing arrow, feathers scattering
background: pale overcast sky, washed in soft blue-grey and white
emotion: anguish, mid-fall, body twisted in pain
